WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

Quantifier sorts
================

  Lemma `L' uses quantifiers with wrong sort: ("x",LSortPub),
    ("y",LSortFresh), ("z",LSortPub)

 Formula guardedness
====================

  Lemma `L' cannot be converted to a guarded formula:
    unguarded variable(s) '~y', '$z' in the subformula
      "∀ $x ~y $z #i. (A( $x ) @ #i) ⇒ (A( ~y ) @ #i)"
    in the formula
      "∀ $x ~y $z #i. (A( $x ) @ #i) ⇒ (A( ~y ) @ #i)"
*/
